title: Junior Business Development Manager at HUDCO

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at HUDCO
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
